nasb.text: for the sons of Ephraim, Hoshea the son of Azaziah; for the half-tribe of Manasseh, Joel the son of Pedaiah;

esv.text: for the Ephraimites, Hoshea the son of Azaziah; for the half-tribe of Manasseh, Joel the son of Pedaiah;

cnv.text: 以法蓮支派的首領是阿撒細雅的兒子何細亞；瑪拿西半個支派的首領是毘大雅的兒子約珥；

ccb.text: 以法莲支派的首领是阿撒细雅的儿子何细亚；玛拿西半个支派的首领是毗大雅的儿子约珥；
